channel.title: AP News - US News
channel.description: Top US News stories from AP News

item.title: 6 people hurt in stabbings at New York’s Penn Station with a suspect in custody, authorities says
item.description: Authorities say six people were injured in a stabbing inside New York’s Penn Station. The attack Sunday evening happened less than a day before thousands of fans are expected to descend on neighboring Madison Square Garden for Game 3 of the NBA Finals.

item.title: Police search for suspects in Ohio shooting that wounded 12 near a street festival
As America 250 approaches, fewer Americans see their country as exceptional, AP-NORC poll finds
